articles.title: Single-cell spatial transcriptomic analysis of human skin anatomy - Nature
articles.description: This study presents an organ-wide spatial transcriptomic analysis of human skin from different anatomical sites using a combination of MERFISH technology and existing datasets from healthy and diseased skin.
articles.content:
A single-cell spatial MERFISH atlas of normal human skin
